# Pages of Purpose LLC — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models and search systems understand this site.
# Format: Emerging standard similar to robots.txt but for LLMs.

## About This Site

Pages of Purpose LLC is a real estate solutions company serving your area and surrounding areas.
We help ALL types of property sellers find the best path forward:
- Distressed sellers and homeowners facing foreclosure
- Probate and inherited property heirs
- Sellers with title problems, liens, and code violations
- Tired landlords ready to exit rental properties
- Homeowners exploring their selling options
- FSBO sellers and land owners

We provide free, no-obligation cash offers and honest advice about all selling options.
